message:
fix(manifest): add missing 'network' category and validate categories at runtime

The ModuleCategory type was missing 'network' which exists in the actual
manifest (install_network.sh is generated). This type mismatch could cause
subtle TypeScript errors.

Also fixed unsafe type casts in getModuleCategory() and resolveModuleCategory()
which previously used `as ModuleCategory` without validation. Now they:
- Validate against a VALID_CATEGORIES set at runtime
- Throw descriptive errors for invalid categories
- Export isValidCategory() as a type guard for external use

Changes:
- packages/manifest/src/types.ts: Added 'network' to ModuleCategory union
- packages/manifest/src/utils.ts: Added VALID_CATEGORIES set, isValidCategory()
  type guard, and runtime validation in getModuleCategory/resolveModuleCategory
- packages/manifest/src/index.ts: Export isValidCategory and resolveModuleCategory

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
